task_completion.description: Open the Bayesian ANCOVA analysis module in JASP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP application window is open and the 'Bayesian ANCOVA' analysis input panel is visible on the left side of the screen.

task_completion.description: Assign Exam as the dependent variable, Gender as the fixed factor, and Anxiety as the covariate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Bayesian ANCOVA input panel, 'Exam' is placed in the 'Dependent Variable' box, 'Gender' is in the 'Fixed Factors' box, and 'Anxiety' is in the 'Covariates' box.

task_completion.description: Include descriptive statistics in the analysis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Descriptive statistics' checkbox is checked (typically under Additional Options), and/or a 'Descriptives' table is visible in the right-hand results pane.

task_completion.description: Create a descriptives plot with Gender on the horizontal axis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Descriptives Plots' section of the input panel, 'Gender' is placed in the 'Horizontal axis' box, and/or a plot showing Exam scores by Gender is visible in the results pane.

task_completion.description: Save the analysis to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the filename 'BayesianANCOVA_ExamAnxiety.jasp' being saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/JASP' directory, or the JASP main window title bar displays 'BayesianANCOVA_ExamAnxiety'.

integrity.description: The agent used the JASP GUI to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through JASP menus, dragging/dropping variables, and interacting with checkboxes rather than using a script or terminal.

integrity.description: The results appear to be genuinely generated by JASP.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results pane should display properly formatted JASP tables and plots, not mockups or text pasted into a different application.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI and spoof the output file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing commands like 'touch /home/ga/Documents/JASP/BayesianANCOVA_ExamAnxiety.jasp' or 'echo ... > ...'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/BayesianANCOVA_ExamAnxiety.jasp'. The dataset used is '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv'. The final output file is a valid JASP archive (.zip format internally) and must exceed 1000 bytes in size.
